title: Atomic Mail 推出专为 AI 智能体打造的 API 优先邮件服务
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Atomic Mail has launched its API-first email, built for AI agents, in which inboxes belong to the agents themselves.
> Atomic Mail operates through MCPs and Agent Skills.
> The agent registers its own account and sends, receives, and replies without a person in the loop.
Agents are taking over 👀
00:00
Atomic Mail
@atomic_mail
11h
API-first email built for AI agents
One prompt to plug in via MCP or Agent Skill
Your agent gets its own inbox – and can run any workflow over email
Free in open alpha - link in comments
00:00
Paid partnership
7:33 PM · Jun 18, 2026 18.8K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: Atomic Mail 发布 API-first 邮件服务，专为 AI 智能体设计。智能体可通过 MCP 或 Agent Skill 一键接入，拥有独立收件箱，无需人工参与即可自动收发和回复邮件，实现全自动化工作流。目前该服务处于免费开放 alpha 阶段。
